name: Jetts 24 Hour Fitness - Central Si Racha
nameThai: เจ็ทส์ ฟิตเนส เซ็นทรัล ศรีราชา
addressFull: Room 226, 2nd floor, Central Si Racha, 8/1 Sukhumvit Road, Si Racha, Chon Buri 20110
hours: Member access 24/7. Staffed Mon-Fri 06:00-22:00; Sat-Sun and public holidays 08:00-20:00

joiningFee.value: THB 1,500 standard value; waived for listed 2026 bank-card promotions subject to terms

accessFee.value: THB 1,500 standard value; waived for listed 2026 bank-card promotions subject to terms

monthly.value: THB 1,750 Freedom (3-month minimum), THB 1,650 Flexi (6 months), THB 1,550 Stay Fit (12 months)

membership.contract: Freedom minimum 3 months; Flexi 6 months; Stay Fit 12 months. Cancellation requires notice at least 30 days before the next billing date.

hold.value: Up to one billing cycle at a time, twice yearly; surplus suspension THB 450/month

equipment.airConditioningNotes: The enclosed second-floor mall club and its current official branch imagery show a fully indoor air-conditioned training floor.

classes.schedule: Available in the Jetts app and branch schedule

praise: Members value the large free-weight area, 24-hour access and broad equipment selection.
complaints: Multiple reviews from the month before verification complain about persistent body/foot odour and poor freshness.
A recent reviewer says the class area is small and criticises cueing, tempo changes and limited form correction.
Peak student use and members occupying machines for long periods are current friction points.

sources.label: Official Central Si Racha branch page
Google Maps location and recent Thai reviews

confidenceReason: Current official pages establish joining/access fees, multiple monthly terms, day passes, contract rules, 24/7 hours and an enclosed air-conditioned branch; independent branch and review sources exceed the four-source minimum.
unverified: current joining/access fee for applicants without an eligible promotion
whether odour complaints had been remediated after June 2026
identityNote: Distinct from the existing Jetts Little Walk Pattaya record: Central Si Racha has a different address and phone.
